name: Felice's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: If using Neufchâtel cheese, add an extra egg and increase the total baking time to 45 minutes, then test for doneness.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine crust ingredients in a bowl. Spray both glass Pyrex pie plates with non-stick coating of your choice. Evenly divide the mixture between the two plates. Pat into place with high sides. Chill at least one hour.
3. Have all filling ingredients at room temperature. Let cream cheese soften in the bowl you'll mix it in.
4. Cream cheese: Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, then salt. Scrape beaters and sides of the bowl. Beat until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract. Add sour cream and blend thoroughly.
5. Divide filling evenly into prepared pie plates. Using your thumb, press some crust crumbs onto the filling around the inner edge of the crust.
6. Bake cheesecakes in the preheated oven for 30 minutes at 350 degrees. Check for doneness: if the cakes jiggle like jello and have started to rise on the sides, remove them and let cool. If not, bake an additional 10 minutes.
7. Cool cheesecakes before serving for at least 6 hours.
Optional: Top each pie with a can of cherry pie filling (or desired filling).
